reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: Added the tracepoint to various slowpath unlock paths, including mutexes and rtmutexes. The tracepoint fires when there are blocked waiters being woken.

2026-03-04.patch_summary: This patch series adds a new tracepoint called contended_release to track when a lock is released due to contention. The tracepoint is added to the slowpath unlock paths of various sleepable locks, including mutexes, rtmutexes, semaphores, and rwsems.
